routing_decision: pivot_to_multichip_tp (user choice; single-chip --archs n150 not runnable on this 8-chip n300-llmbox fabric host, and the 14B transformer needs tensor-parallel)

details.scaffold_convention: wan2_2 in-repo pattern (shared.py + per-component test files)
loader_workarounds: monkeypatch sinusoidal_embedding_1d to drop hardcoded torch.cuda.current_device() (model.py:33) — device-agnostic; required on CPU and TT

cpu_sanity.transformer_wrapper: PASSED shape=(1,16,3,8,8) finite (2-block truncated, tiny spatial)
cpu_sanity.umt5: not CPU-sanitied (identical class+tie-fix to proven wan2_2 loader)

components_scaffolded.name: vae
components_scaffolded.reason: single_device node needs runtime_chip_count==1; run test_vae_decoder_480p_sharded on this mesh, or the unsharded node on a 1-board host

next_stage: FIRST_RUN_TP (model-bringup-run-torch-tp) on the 8-chip mesh; recommend sharded VAE first as smoke test
blockers: transformer training/block_mask path uses torch.compile flex_attention (unsupported on TT) — inference path uses SDPA and is what the test exercises
transformer does in-place KV-cache mutation with cache-state-derived slice indices (static for the frame-0 step the wrapper exercises; compile risk to watch)

vae_decoder_480p_sharded.cause: aten.slice dim=2 start=-2 negative index in torch_xla cpu-fallback partition (causal VAE)
